items.name: Ottawa-Fulton Ramp

note: City parking garages offer more affordable rates ($1.50/hour, max $12) and are good alternatives to premium ramps. They're typically 0.2-0.3 miles from Van Andel Arena and provide structured parking at a lower cost.
